title: Fadeno Run
description: One concrete execution of a playbook. Written to .fadeno/runs/<id>/run.yaml. This is the file-backed run ledger that makes a run inspectable and is the seam a future compiled runtime reads/writes.

schema_version.description: Run-ledger format version. Ledgers without it are legacy (pre-0.2) and are readable only in an explicit compatibility mode (--legacy).

host.description: Execution host, e.g. codex, claude, cli.
